name: Ganja Lounge (4Netplayers)
comment Default: The Default difficulty setting configures all values to default. It is the direct continuation of how Enshrouded was configured up until update 0.7.3.0 and is the recommended setting for first-time players.
comment Relaxed: The Relaxed preset reduces the amount of enemies and provides players with more resources and loot. This mode targets players who are most interested in base-building and light-hearted adventuring.
comment Hard: The Hard preset increases the amount of enemies and makes them more aggressive to give players a tougher combat experience.
comment Survival: The Survival preset is for those who seek some punishment with additional survival mechanics on top of more aggressive enemies.
comment Custom: When Custom is selected, a long list of individual settings can be tweaked.

userGroups.name: Admin
userGroups.comment Admin Password: The Admin password must not be the same as Friend or Guest.

userGroups.name: Friend
userGroups.comment Friend Password: The Friend password must not be the same as Admin or Guest.

userGroups.name: Guest
userGroups.comment Guest Password: The Guest password must not be the same as Admin or Friend.
